creation_method: Original high-contrast composition built from geometric primitives and text. The SVG master and deterministic 1-bit PNG exports use the same monochrome Evidence grid structure for predictable rendering and compact file size.
author: Vsevolod Rymar
rights: Original project assets released under the repository MIT License.

validation.master_export_consistency: PASS: SVG and PNG exports share the same monochrome Evidence grid composition.
validation.safe_area: PASS: title and core symbols remain inside the central 1120 x 480 area with 80 px outer margin.
validation.readability_25_percent: PASS: project name and three mode labels remain readable at 320 x 160.
validation.brand_trace: PASS: no third-party logos, interface screenshots or copied assets.
validation.skill_package_exclusion: PASS: all design and asset files are repository-only.
